200.q: I led India to independence through nonviolent resistance.
I was a Roman dictator stabbed on the Ides of March.
I painted the Mona Lisa.
I formulated the theory of relativity and the equation E=mc².
I was the first U.S. President.
I led the Allied forces in WWII as British Prime Minister.
I was a French general who became Emperor and lost at Waterloo.
I gave the 'I Have a Dream' speech in 1963.
I was the queen of England during the defeat of the Spanish Armada in 1588.
I was the long-reigning queen of the British Empire in the 19th century.
I sailed across the Atlantic in 1492.
I was the 16th U.S. President and ended slavery.
I was an inventor known for the light bulb and phonograph.
I was a German-born theoretical physicist with wild white hair.
I was a Greek philosopher and student of Plato.
I was an Italian astronomer who supported heliocentrism.
I was the founder of Facebook.
I was the third U.S. President and author of the Declaration of Independence.
I was a Spanish painter known for melting clocks.
I was a Mexican painter known for self-portraits and unibrow.
I founded Microsoft with Paul Allen.
I was a German-born physicist who developed quantum theory.
I was a co-founder of Apple with Steve Wozniak.
I was a Tibetan spiritual leader awarded the Nobel Peace Prize in 1989.
I was an English playwright who wrote Romeo and Juliet.
I was a Greek philosopher who drank hemlock.
I was a Dutch painter who cut off part of my ear.
I was the founder of modern psychoanalysis.
I was a Jewish girl who wrote a famous diary while hiding from Nazis.
I was a deaf and blind American author and activist.
I was the first woman to fly solo across the Atlantic.
I refused to give up my seat on a bus and sparked a civil rights movement.
I was a German philosopher and co-author of 'The Communist Manifesto.'
I was the Mongol warrior-emperor known as the conqueror of Asia.

400.q: I was a Macedonian king who built an empire stretching to India.
I discovered penicillin.
I was the last Tsar of Russia.
I led the Soviet Union during WWII.
I was a Polish-French scientist who won two Nobel Prizes for radioactivity work.
I formulated the laws of motion and universal gravitation.
I was the founder of the Mongol Empire.
I led the French Revolution as a Jacobin and was executed by guillotine.
I was a famous Egyptian queen who allied with Caesar and Mark Antony.
I was the founder of Buddhism.
I was the Chinese revolutionary who founded the People's Republic in 1949.
I was an English physicist whose work on cosmology was renowned despite ALS.
I was an American jazz trumpeter known as Satchmo.
I was a Russian chemist who created the periodic table.
I was an Indian leader and one of the founders of the Indian National Congress.
I was a Roman emperor known as the Stoic philosopher who wrote 'Meditations.'
I was an Austrian-born American conductor and composer of musicals.
I was an English nurse who founded modern nursing during the Crimean War.
I was the U.S. President assassinated in Dallas in 1963.
I was a French scientist who proved the germ theory of disease.
I was the Soviet leader who introduced 'glasnost' and 'perestroika.'
I was a U.S. President during the Civil War.
I was a German-born physicist who developed the atomic bomb's design as part of the Manhattan Project.
I was a Romanian-born Israeli writer and Holocaust survivor who wrote 'Night.'
I was the Mughal emperor who built the Taj Mahal.
I was an English naturalist who proposed the theory of evolution by natural selection.
I was a French painter and sculptor, founder of cubism with Braque.
I was an Italian astronomer and engineer who improved the telescope.
I was the founder of Standard Oil and one of the wealthiest Americans of all time.
I was the first female British Prime Minister.
I was an African American civil rights activist and Muslim minister.
I was an Argentine revolutionary who fought alongside Fidel Castro.
I was an American boxer known as 'The Greatest.'
I was a Pakistani activist who survived being shot by the Taliban and won the Nobel Peace Prize.

600.q: I was a Carthaginian general who crossed the Alps with elephants.
I was the Persian king who invaded Greece and was repelled at Salamis.
I was a Florentine political philosopher who wrote 'The Prince.'
I was a Spanish conquistador who toppled the Aztec Empire.
I was a German monk whose 95 Theses sparked the Reformation.
I was an English physicist and chemist who pioneered electromagnetism.
I was a Soviet cosmonaut, first human in space.
I was a Polish astronomer who placed the Sun at the center of the universe.
I was an Indian emperor who built the Taj Mahal as a tomb for my wife.
I was a Roman general turned emperor, the founder of the Empire.
I was an Italian explorer whose name appears on the American continents.
I was a Russian author of 'War and Peace.'
I was a French chemist and biologist who developed pasteurization.
I was a Hungarian-American physicist known as the 'father of the hydrogen bomb.'
I was a Serbian-American inventor and pioneer of alternating current.
I was an English mathematician who broke Nazi codes at Bletchley Park.
I was a Spanish painter known for 'Guernica' and surreal cubist work.
I was a Russian author of 'Crime and Punishment.'
I was a Bohemian-born Austrian composer of 'Symphony No. 9.'
I was a French author of 'Les Misérables.'
I was a Russian revolutionary who led the Bolsheviks to power in 1917.
I was the founder of psychoanalytic theory in Vienna.
I was an English author of 'A Christmas Carol.'
I was a German composer who wrote nine symphonies despite being deaf.
I was an Austrian composer who wrote 'The Magic Flute.'
I was the Macedonian-born Catholic nun who served in Calcutta.
I was the South African leader who became president after years in prison.
I was the Polish-born scientist who discovered radium.
I was a Roman general who said 'Veni, vidi, vici.'
I was an English author of 'Pride and Prejudice.'
I was the Ottoman Sultan who besieged Vienna in 1529.
I was the Russian empress nicknamed 'the Great' who ruled in the 18th century.
I was the Prussian king famous for militarizing and modernizing the state.
